name: Baba Ghanouj- Quick and Easy Diabetic Menus
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the broiler.
2. Slice the surface of the eggplant and cool it.
3. Peel the slices.
4. Puree the peeled slices in a blender or food processor along with the rest of the ingredients.
5. Chill and serve with vegetables.
Note: Tahini is sesame paste, made from ground sesame seeds similar to peanut butter. It can be found at health food stores. Serving size: Approximately 1/3 cup (68 calories); Protein: 3g, Carbohydrates: 6g, Fat: 4g, Sodium: 38mg exchanges: 1 vegetable + 1 fat
